description_long: This is a pair of slip-on casual shoes with a sleek, modern design, featuring a dark navy or black upper made from what appears to be a synthetic or textile material. The shoes have a low-cut profile with a slightly elastic side panel for easy wearing and removal, and a subtle brown trim around the collar for added style. The soles are thick, white, and made of rubber or foam, providing cushioning and grip suitable for urban walking. The upper material is smooth with minimal visible stitching, giving the shoes a clean and streamlined appearance. There are no visible logos, laces, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The interior appears to be lined with a soft material for comfort.
description: A pair of modern, slip-on casual shoes with a dark upper, brown trim, and thick white soles, designed for comfort and urban use. The shoes have a minimalist, lace-free design with elastic side panels.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the smooth, dark upper, white sole, and brown collar trim; the slip-on design and elastic side panel are visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shoe's profile, thick white sole, and the continuous brown trim around the collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel area, brown trim, and the back of the white sole; the slip-on opening is clearly visible.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view emphasizing the seamless upper, elastic side panel, and the overall streamlined shape.
